description: Machine-readable catalog of all AI-Skills assets. Add an entry here every time you contribute a new asset.

assets.title: Summarize Pull Request for Reviewers
assets.description: Generates a concise, reviewer-friendly summary of a pull request from its title, description, and list of changed files.

assets.title: Incident Triage First-Responder Guide
assets.description: Guides the on-call engineer through structured incident triage by analysing alert details and recent changes to suggest probable root causes and immediate mitigation steps.

assets.title: Architecture Decision Record (ADR) Generator
assets.description: Generates a well-structured Architecture Decision Record (ADR) in the MADR format from a brief description of the decision context, options considered, and the chosen option.

assets.title: Generate Test Cases from User Story
assets.description: Generates a comprehensive set of test cases (happy path, edge cases, and negative scenarios) from a user story and its acceptance criteria, formatted as Gherkin scenarios.

assets.title: Explain Technical Concept in Plain Language
assets.description: Translates any technical concept into clear, jargon-free language tailored to a specified audience level. Useful across all work streams.

assets.title: Summarize Any Document or Text
assets.description: Produces a structured summary of any document or long text block with configurable detail level and output format.

assets.title: Structured Code Review
assets.description: Reviews a code snippet or file for correctness, maintainability, security issues, and adherence to best practices, returning findings categorised by severity.

assets.title: Runbook Generator
assets.description: Generates a structured operational runbook for a service or alert, including description, escalation path, diagnostic steps, and resolution procedures.

assets.title: Architecture Trade-Off Analysis
assets.description: Produces a structured trade-off analysis comparing two or more architecture or technology options across configurable quality attributes.

assets.title: Test Coverage Gap Analysis
assets.description: Analyses an existing test suite description against feature requirements to identify untested scenarios, missing edge cases, and risk-weighted coverage gaps.

assets.title: Resource Utilization Analysis
assets.description: Analyses resource utilization data to identify over-provisioned and under-provisioned resources, headroom risk, and cost-saving opportunities.

assets.title: Performance Bottleneck Analysis
assets.description: Analyses load test results or performance metrics to identify bottlenecks, classify them by root-cause category, and provide prioritised remediation recommendations.

assets.title: Sequence Diagram Generator
assets.description: Generates a Mermaid sequence diagram from a prose description of a system interaction, API flow, or user journey.

assets.title: Automated Code Refactoring Agent
assets.description: An autonomous agent that continuously scans a codebase for technical debt, proposes and applies targeted refactors, and opens pull requests for human review.

assets.title: Automated Runbook Currency Agent
assets.description: An agent that monitors service changes and automatically proposes runbook updates to keep operational documentation current.

assets.title: Architecture Drift Detector
assets.description: An agent that compares the actual deployed system topology against documented architecture and flags deviations.

assets.title: Intelligent Test Suite Maintenance Agent
assets.description: An agent that monitors the test suite for flaky tests, outdated test data, and redundant coverage, and proposes targeted fixes.

assets.title: Predictive Auto-Scaling Recommendation Agent
assets.description: An agent that analyses historical traffic patterns and business event calendars to pre-emptively recommend scaling actions.

assets.title: Continuous Performance Benchmarking Agent
assets.description: An agent that runs lightweight performance benchmarks on every PR and blocks merge if a configurable regression threshold is exceeded.

assets.title: Design Pattern Recommender
assets.description: An agent that analyses a system design description and recommends the most appropriate design patterns with pros, cons, and implementation guidance.
